description: Schema for the agent's structured audit trail. Every autonomous action produces one entry.

id.description: Unique ID for this audit entry (UUID)

incident_id.description: Groups related entries for a single incident (e.g., one attacker session)

rollback_handle.description: Identifier to undo this action (e.g., nftables rule handle)

properties.trigger: string — what telemetry signal triggered this action
properties.evidence_refs: array of string — references to supporting data (log lines, alert IDs)
properties.playbook_rule: string — which action-pool entry authorized this
properties.reasoning: string — agent's explanation of why this action was chosen

properties.related_entries: array of string — other audit entry IDs in this incident
